messages.content: I want you to act as a linux terminal. I will type commands and you will reply with what the terminal should show. I want you to only reply with the terminal output inside one unique code block, and nothing else. do not write explanations. do not type commands unless I instruct you to do so. When I need to tell you something in English, I will do so by putting text inside curly brackets {like this}. My first command is pwd

evidence: I will type commands and you will reply with what the terminal should show.
interactionPattern.rationale: The human issues command-like prompts and the AI responds with corresponding outputs, functioning as a request-response loop analogous to Q&A.

evidence: I want you to act as a linux terminal.
do not type commands unless I instruct you to do so.
powerDynamics.rationale: The human sets strict rules and controls the sequence of actions by issuing commands; the AI follows.

evidence: I want you to only reply with the terminal output inside one unique code block, and nothing else.
emotionalTone.rationale: The exchange is procedural and task-focused with explicit formatting constraints and no socio-emotional language.

evidence: I want you to act as a linux terminal.

engagementStyle.rationale: The human gives directives and iteratively issues further commands; the AI complies with outputs.

knowledgeExchange.rationale: The interaction centers on executing/validating command-line behavior (procedural know-how) rather than personal sharing or opinions.

evidence: I want you to act as a linux terminal.
conversationPurpose.rationale: The human is testing whether the AI can simulate a Linux terminal across multiple commands and outputs.

topicDepth.rationale: Multiple commands are issued, but there is no extended exploration or troubleshooting; outputs are brief and discrete.

turnTaking.rationale: Turns alternate consistently and are relatively short on both sides (commands vs short outputs).

humanRole.rationale: The human strongly specifies constraints and controls the interaction by issuing commands and rules, indicating a high-authority directing role.

evidence.quote: I will type commands and you will reply with what the terminal should show.

aiRole.rationale: The AI primarily provides direct outputs as if authoritative terminal results (expert-system), while also participating in a constrained simulation jointly defined by the human (some co-constructor).
